seoTitle: Mayfield North vs Mayfield West — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mayfield North and Mayfield West. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mayfield North vs Mayfield West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mayfield North and Mayfield West.
heading: Mayfield North vs Mayfield West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mayfield North, New South Wales and Mayfield West, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mayfield West has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Mayfield North (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mayfield North or Mayfield West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mayfield North has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Mayfield West scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mayfield North scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mayfield West scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mayfield North or Mayfield West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mayfield West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
